    bytes,
    IO[Any],
    StreamingBody,
]

    str,
]

    BuildTypeDef#

class BuildTypeDef(TypedDict):
    BuildId: NotRequired[str],
    BuildArn: NotRequired[str],
    Name: NotRequired[str],
    Version: NotRequired[str],
    Status: NotRequired[BuildStatusType],  # (1)
